$curated: Slot bindings for game-recall — the FE-side truth for the two keyed MxCard nodes (game-recall/term, game-recall/meaning) in game-recall.gen.json, cross-checked live by test/presentation/features/game/game_recall_parity_test.dart. `role` is the MxTextRole the FE renders; `bind` is the domain value (card data — NOT l10n, user content). Curated from game-recall.slots.skeleton.json: `term` kept as proposed (displayLarge). `meaning` = bodyLarge — the FE truth (recall_game.dart), NOT the skeleton's before-reveal hint 'Recall the meaning, then tap Show' (that is kit MOCK COPY with no l10n key; the meaning card only renders after reveal and shows the card's actual meaning). Non-MxCard skeleton node (reveal) dropped — Template A loops only MxCard. State scope: a 1-card recall round; meaning renders only when revealed.
